item.title: Mary Kay Letourneau case
item.description: One of the most controversial teacher‑student scandals in U.S. history. How does Jackie Flores unpack the lasting impact of Mary Kay Letourneau’s case?

media:content.media:title: Mary Kay Letourneau case

item.title: A Missing Person Story

item.title: Rosie Tapia case
item.description: A 6‑year‑old vanished from her home in 1995, sparking decades of questions. How does Jackie Flores revisit the haunting mystery of Rosie Tapia?

media:content.media:title: Rosie Tapia case
media:content.media:description: A 6‑year‑old vanished from her home in 1995, sparking decades of questions. How does Jackie Flores revisit the haunting mystery of Rosie Tapia?

item.title: The Rocío Wanninkhof Case: Part One
item.description: A disappearance in Spain led to one of the country’s most infamous trials. What early missteps and public pressure shaped the first chapter of this haunting case?

media:content.media:description: A disappearance in Spain led to one of the country’s most infamous trials. What early missteps and public pressure shaped the first chapter of this haunting case?

item.title: Melissa Chávez Case Overview
item.description: A tragic case that shook investigators and the public alike. What hidden family dynamics and shocking evidence finally revealed the truth behind Melissa Chávez’s story?

item.title: She Never Made It Home From School!
item.description: A routine walk from school turned into a chilling mystery. This video revisits the heartbreaking case of a young girl who vanished before reaching home, leaving behind unanswered questions and a community desperate for answers.

media:content.media:title: She Never Made It Home From School!
media:content.media:description: A routine walk from school turned into a chilling mystery. This video revisits the heartbreaking case of a young girl who vanished before reaching home, leaving behind unanswered questions and a community desperate for answers.

item.title: I Hope She Is Found Soon…
item.description: A heartfelt plea for missing children everywhere — this clip captures the hope and urgency that families feel when a loved one vanishes.

media:content.media:title: I Hope She Is Found Soon…
media:content.media:description: A heartfelt plea for missing children everywhere — this clip captures the hope and urgency that families feel when a loved one vanishes.

item.title: Rocío Wanninkhof Case: Part Two
item.description: Years after a wrongful conviction shocked Spain, the real killer was finally identified. How did investigators uncover the truth, and what lasting lessons did this case leave behind?

media:content.media:title: Rocío Wanninkhof Case: Part Two
media:content.media:description: Years after a wrongful conviction shocked Spain, the real killer was finally identified. How did investigators uncover the truth, and what lasting lessons did this case leave behind?

item.title: Sunday School Teacher Did the Unthinkable
item.description: Trusted by families, a Sunday school teacher betrayed that trust in the worst way — committing an unthinkable crime against a little girl. This case reveals how appearances can hide dark realities.

media:content.media:title: Sunday School Teacher Did the Unthinkable
media:content.media:description: Trusted by families, a Sunday school teacher betrayed that trust in the worst way — committing an unthinkable crime against a little girl. This case reveals how appearances can hide dark realities.

item.title: The Abduction of Cherish Perrywinkle
item.description: In 2013, 8‑year‑old Cherish Perrywinkle was taken from a Walmart by a man who preyed on her family’s trust. This case highlights the dangers of manipulation and the importance of vigilance.

media:content.media:title: The Abduction of Cherish Perrywinkle
media:content.media:description: In 2013, 8‑year‑old Cherish Perrywinkle was taken from a Walmart by a man who preyed on her family’s trust. This case highlights the dangers of manipulation and the importance of vigilance.

item.title: The Case of Lucero Princess Sarabia
item.description: A young life cut short — the case of Lucero Princess Sarabia shocked many with its tragic details. This video revisits her story and the search for justice.
